example: I need to make a doctor's appointment for next week.
Can you tell me what symptoms you're experiencing?
I have a bad cough and a sore throat.
I've been feeling dizzy since this morning.
Please bring your insurance card to the appointment.
If your symptoms get worse, go to the emergency room immediately.
I've had this persistent cough for three days.
Is the cough dry, or are you bringing up mucus?
I felt warm yesterday evening, but I didn't take my temperature.
Your lungs sound a bit congested.
I think you have bronchitis, an infection in your airways.
ja: 気管支炎（きかんしえん）

example: I'm going to prescribe an antibiotic and a cough syrup.
ja: 抗生物質（こうせいせいそ）

example: Take the cough syrup every six hours as needed.
Here's your prescription. Take this to any pharmacy.
I went to the pharmacy to pick up my medicine.
Are there any side effects from this medicine?
Is this illness contagious? Can I spread it to others?
I've been feeling nauseous all morning.
On a scale of one to ten, how bad is the pain?
Take one tablet three times daily with food.
If it's almost time for the next dose, just skip it.
Make sure you complete the full course of antibiotics.
My nose feels stuffy and congested.
I have a sore throat and a cough.
I feel pressure in my chest when I breathe deeply.
Take the antibiotic three times a day with food.
ja: 食事と一緒に薬を飲む

example: Avoid smoking or dusty environments while recovering.
Knock, knock. Hello, Miss Johnson.
Please arrive 10 minutes early to fill out paperwork.
Stay home to avoid spreading the infection to others.
